      25              : #include "utils/fmgroids.h"
      26              : #include "utils/hsearch.h"
      27              : #include "utils/inval.h"
      28              : #include "utils/rel.h"
      29              : #include "utils/relfilenodemap.h"
      30              : #include "utils/relmapper.h"
      31              : 
      32              : /* Hash table for information about each relfilenode <-> oid pair */
      33              : static HTAB *RelfilenodeMapHash = NULL;
      34              : 
      35              : /* built first time through in InitializeRelfilenodeMap */
      36              : static ScanKeyData relfilenode_skey[2];
      37              : 
      38              : typedef struct
      39              : {
      40              :         Oid                     reltablespace;
      41              :         Oid                     relfilenode;
      42              : } RelfilenodeMapKey;
      43              : 
      44              : typedef struct
      45              : {
      46              :         RelfilenodeMapKey key;          /* lookup key - must be first */
      47              :         Oid                     relid;                  /* pg_class.oid */
      48              : } RelfilenodeMapEntry;
      49              : 
      50              : /*
      51              :  * RelfilenodeMapInvalidateCallback
      52              :  *              Flush mapping entries when pg_class is updated in a relevant fashion.
      53              :  */
      54              : static void
      55            0 : RelfilenodeMapInvalidateCallback(Datum arg, Oid relid)
      56              : {
      57              :         HASH_SEQ_STATUS status;
      58              :         RelfilenodeMapEntry *entry;
      59              : 
      60              :         /* callback only gets registered after creating the hash */
      61              :         Assert(RelfilenodeMapHash != NULL);
      62              : 
      63            0 :         hash_seq_init(&status, RelfilenodeMapHash);
      64            0 :         while ((entry = (RelfilenodeMapEntry *) hash_seq_search(&status)) != NULL)
      65              :         {
      66              :                 /*
      67              :                  * If relid is InvalidOid, signaling a complete reset, we must remove
      68              :                  * all entries, otherwise just remove the specific relation's entry.
      69              :                  * Always remove negative cache entries.
      70              :                  */
      71            0 :                 if (relid == InvalidOid ||      /* complete reset */
      72            0 :                         entry->relid == InvalidOid ||        /* negative cache entry */
      73            0 :                         entry->relid == relid)       /* individual flushed relation */
      74              :                 {
      75            0 :                         if (hash_search(RelfilenodeMapHash,
      76            0 :                                                         (void *) &entry->key,
      77              :                                                         HASH_REMOVE,
      78              :                                                         NULL) == NULL)
      79            0 :                                 elog(ERROR, "hash table corrupted");
      80              :                 }
      81              :         }
      82            0 : }
      83              : 
      84              : /*
      85              :  * RelfilenodeMapInvalidateCallback
      86              :  *              Initialize cache, either on first use or after a reset.
      87              :  */
      88              : static void
      89            0 : InitializeRelfilenodeMap(void)
      90              : {
      91              :         HASHCTL         ctl;
      92              :         int                     i;
      93              : 
      94              :         /* Make sure we've initialized CacheMemoryContext. */
      95            0 :         if (CacheMemoryContext == NULL)
      96            0 :                 CreateCacheMemoryContext();
      97              : 
      98              :         /* build skey */
      99            0 :         MemSet(&relfilenode_skey, 0, sizeof(relfilenode_skey));
     100              : 
     101            0 :         for (i = 0; i < 2; i++)
     102              :         {
     103            0 :                 fmgr_info_cxt(F_OIDEQ,
     104              :                                           &relfilenode_skey[i].sk_func,
     105              :                                           CacheMemoryContext);
     106            0 :                 relfilenode_skey[i].sk_strategy = BTEqualStrategyNumber;
     107            0 :                 relfilenode_skey[i].sk_subtype = InvalidOid;
     108            0 :                 relfilenode_skey[i].sk_collation = InvalidOid;
     109              :         }
     110              : 
     111            0 :         relfilenode_skey[0].sk_attno = Anum_pg_class_reltablespace;
     112            0 :         relfilenode_skey[1].sk_attno = Anum_pg_class_relfilenode;
     113              : 
     114              :         /* Initialize the hash table. */
     115            0 :         MemSet(&ctl, 0, sizeof(ctl));
     116            0 :         ctl.keysize = sizeof(RelfilenodeMapKey);
     117            0 :         ctl.entrysize = sizeof(RelfilenodeMapEntry);
     118            0 :         ctl.hcxt = CacheMemoryContext;
     119              : 
     120              :         /*
     121              :          * Only create the RelfilenodeMapHash now, so we don't end up partially
     122              :          * initialized when fmgr_info_cxt() above ERRORs out with an out of memory
     123              :          * error.
     124              :          */
     125            0 :         RelfilenodeMapHash =
     126            0 :                 hash_create("RelfilenodeMap cache", 64, &ctl,
     127              :                                         HASH_ELEM | HASH_BLOBS | HASH_CONTEXT);
     128              : 
     129              :         /* Watch for invalidation events. */
     130            0 :         CacheRegisterRelcacheCallback(RelfilenodeMapInvalidateCallback,
     131              :                                                                   (Datum) 0);
     132            0 : }
     133              : 
     134              : /*
     135              :  * Map a relation's (tablespace, filenode) to a relation's oid and cache the
     136              :  * result.
     137              :  *
     138              :  * A temporary relation may share its relfilenumber with a permanent relation
     139              :  * or temporary relations created in other backends.  Being able to uniquely
     140              :  * identify a temporary relation would require a backend's proc number, which
     141              :  * we do not know about.  Hence, this function ignores this case.
     142              :  *
     143              :  * Returns InvalidOid if no relation matching the criteria could be found.
     144              :  */
     145              : Oid
     146            0 : RelidByRelfilenode(Oid reltablespace, Oid relfilenode)
     147              : {
     148              :         RelfilenodeMapKey key;
     149              :         RelfilenodeMapEntry *entry;
     150              :         bool            found;
     151              :         SysScanDesc scandesc;
     152              :         Relation        relation;
     153              :         HeapTuple       ntp;
     154              :         ScanKeyData skey[2];
     155              :         Oid                     relid;
     156              : 
     157            0 :         if (RelfilenodeMapHash == NULL)
     158            0 :                 InitializeRelfilenodeMap();
     159              : 
     160              :         /* pg_class will show 0 when the value is actually MyDatabaseTableSpace */
     161            0 :         if (reltablespace == MyDatabaseTableSpace)
     162            0 :                 reltablespace = 0;
     163              : 
     164            0 :         MemSet(&key, 0, sizeof(key));
     165            0 :         key.reltablespace = reltablespace;
     166            0 :         key.relfilenode = relfilenode;
     167              : 
     168              :         /*
     169              :          * Check cache and return entry if one is found. Even if no target
     170              :          * relation can be found later on we store the negative match and return a
     171              :          * InvalidOid from cache. That's not really necessary for performance
     172              :          * since querying invalid values isn't supposed to be a frequent thing,
     173              :          * but it's basically free.
     174              :          */
     175            0 :         entry = hash_search(RelfilenodeMapHash, (void *) &key, HASH_FIND, &found);
     176              : 
     177            0 :         if (found)
     178            0 :                 return entry->relid;
     179              : 
     180              :         /* ok, no previous cache entry, do it the hard way */
     181              : 
     182              :         /* initialize empty/negative cache entry before doing the actual lookups */
     183            0 :         relid = InvalidOid;
     184              : 
     185            0 :         if (reltablespace == GLOBALTABLESPACE_OID)
     186              :         {
     187              :                 /*
     188              :                  * Ok, shared table, check relmapper.
     189              :                  */
     190            0 :                 relid = RelationMapFilenodeToOid(relfilenode, true);
     191              :         }
     192              :         else
     193              :         {
     194              :                 /*
     195              :                  * Not a shared table, could either be a plain relation or a
     196              :                  * non-shared, nailed one, like e.g. pg_class.
     197              :                  */
     198              : 
     199              :                 /* check for plain relations by looking in pg_class */
     200            0 :                 relation = table_open(RelationRelationId, AccessShareLock);
     201              : 
     202              :                 /* copy scankey to local copy, it will be modified during the scan */
     203            0 :                 memcpy(skey, relfilenode_skey, sizeof(skey));
     204              : 
     205              :                 /* set scan arguments */
     206            0 :                 skey[0].sk_argument = ObjectIdGetDatum(reltablespace);
     207            0 :                 skey[1].sk_argument = ObjectIdGetDatum(relfilenode);
     208              : 
     209            0 :                 scandesc = systable_beginscan(relation,
     210              :                                                                           ClassTblspcRelfilenodeIndexId,
     211              :                                                                           true,
     212              :                                                                           NULL,
     213              :                                                                           2,
     214              :                                                                           skey);
     215              : 
     216            0 :                 found = false;
     217              : 
     218            0 :                 while (HeapTupleIsValid(ntp = systable_getnext(scandesc)))
     219              :                 {
     220            0 :                         Form_pg_class classform = (Form_pg_class) GETSTRUCT(ntp);
     221              : 
     222            0 :                         if (classform->relpersistence == RELPERSISTENCE_TEMP)
     223            0 :                                 continue;
     224              : 
     225            0 :                         if (found)
     226            0 :                                 elog(ERROR,
     227              :                                          "unexpected duplicate for tablespace %u, relfilenode %u",
     228              :                                          reltablespace, relfilenode);
     229            0 :                         found = true;
     230              : 
     231              :                         Assert(classform->reltablespace == reltablespace);
     232              :                         Assert(classform->relfilenode == relfilenode);
     233            0 :                         relid = classform->oid;
     234              :                 }
     235              : 
     236            0 :                 systable_endscan(scandesc);
     237            0 :                 table_close(relation, AccessShareLock);
     238              : 
     239              :                 /* check for tables that are mapped but not shared */
     240            0 :                 if (!found)
     241            0 :                         relid = RelationMapFilenodeToOid(relfilenode, false);
     242              :         }
     243              : 
     244              :         /*
     245              :          * Only enter entry into cache now, our opening of pg_class could have
     246              :          * caused cache invalidations to be executed which would have deleted a
     247              :          * new entry if we had entered it above.
     248              :          */
     249            0 :         entry = hash_search(RelfilenodeMapHash, (void *) &key, HASH_ENTER, &found);
     250            0 :         if (found)
     251            0 :                 elog(ERROR, "corrupted hashtable");
     252            0 :         entry->relid = relid;
     253              : 
     254            0 :         return relid;
     255              : }
